introduction: SYNOPSISHye-ja, Jung-hee and Ji-yeon are old college friends who plan to have a couples' party at a villa. The women are sexually assaulted by a bunch of thugs in front of their husbands. The couples all undergo marriage crises and they all go through divorces. The three friends try to recover from the trauma, separated from their spouses. But Jung-hee is unable to deal with her ordeal and takes her own life. Hye-Ja takes a trip by herself to shake off the tragedies that have occurred but she is haunted by lure of strange men wherever she goes. But when her husband and daughter come to find her, she decides to overcome the past and return to her family.故事大学生校友Hyeja，Junghee和Dela与夫妇一起去别墅。没想到，她在丈夫面前被强奸。这些夫妇陷入破产，走到离婚的边缘。惠 - JA，假虎，推迟到分离的生活是自己的努力，但曼达和假虎自杀后遗症，从一天的噩梦逃跑。当一系列令人震惊的事件继续发生的时候，惠耶试图独自旅行，以逃避他毫无意义的生活，但他在男人不断的试探中很难过。然而，惠耶决定回到家中，她的丈夫和女儿的意外的访问，结束漫长的流浪。
